prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业招生计划有所增加；本省物理类考生从2025年约26.0万增至2026年约26.4万（按近年占比估算），小幅增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合扩招约7.4%导致竞争加剧、学校排名稳步上升增强吸引力、本省考生小幅增加等因素，在2025年基准15522名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约16245名， 区间15745-16745名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 12790 → 14206 → 14698 → 23983 → 15522, showing an overall backward trend with significant fluctuations in the past three years; the baseline for 2025 is about 15522; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 103 in 2021, 111 in 2022, 114 in 2023, 116 in 2024, and 121 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 130, an expansion of about 7.4% compared to 2025, slightly increasing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2022, there was a negative academic misconduct incident, but reputation has been stable in recent years; Douyin popularity ranks 75th overall, rated as "average", with moderate short video exposure, no clear signal of increased or decreased application attention; Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science are all A- level, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, attracting some applicants to related majors; 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing attractiveness to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity, and the university's enrollment plans for related majors have increased; the number of provincial Physics Category candidates increased from about 260,000 in 2025 to about 264,000 in 2026 (estimated based on recent proportions), a small increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as an expansion of about 7.4% leading to intensified competition, the steady rise in university rankings enhancing attractiveness, and a small increase in provincial candidates, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward from the 2025 baseline of 15522; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16245, with a range of 15745-16745.
